summary: Completed testing of Public API endpoints and Football Drive Calculator fix. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing limited due to CORS issue in preview environment.

integration_issues.issue: CORS error blocking login API call from iframe - 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header missing
integration_issues.note: This is a preview environment infrastructure issue, not a code bug. Backend API works correctly when called directly.

critical_code_review_comments: Football Drive Calculator fix verified: startNewDrive() now accepts optional startPos parameter to avoid stale state
All turnover scenarios (fumble, interception, turnover on downs, punt, after FG) correctly pass newBallPosition explicitly
Public API Key Management endpoints properly implemented with create/list/delete functionality
GET /api/games/public endpoint correctly requires X-API-Key header and supports filters (date, status, sport)
GET /api/games/{game_id}/rosters endpoint correctly requires X-API-Key header and returns rosters with player stats
AccountSettings.jsx has complete API Keys section with create, list, delete, and documentation

success_rate.frontend: Unable to test due to CORS in preview environment

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Integration_Key during API key management tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend API tests pass (14/14). Public API endpoints working correctly with API key authentication. Football drive calculator fix verified via code review - startNewDrive now accepts explicit startPos parameter to avoid stale state bug. Frontend testing blocked by CORS issue in preview environment (iframe-based architecture). The CORS error is: 'Access to XMLHttpRequest at statmoose.preview.emergentagent.com/api/auth/login from origin statmoose.preview.static.emergentagent.com has been blocked by CORS policy'. Backend API works correctly when called directly via curl.

code_review.football_drive_calculator_fix: VERIFIED - startNewDrive accepts startPos parameter, all turnover scenarios pass explicit position
code_review.game_rosters_endpoint: VERIFIED - requires X-API-Key, returns rosters with stats
code_review.account_settings_api_keys_ui: VERIFIED - complete UI with create, list, delete, documentation
